step: Stage 2: Lite-path analysis via Claude Code subagent
substitution_rule: Claude Code subagents (general-purpose) instead of anthropic.Anthropic().messages.create()

syntheses.risk_assessment: RSI_14 at 84.1 is firmly in overbought territory (>70), signaling elevated pullback risk despite a strong composite_score of 8.107 and momentum_3m of 13.2%. Conviction is reduced from a baseline BUY to HOLD pending mean-reversion or a constructive consolidation.

Composite score of -1.557 is mildly negative, tilting the baseline toward caution. RSI_14 at 45.4 is mid-range neutral, providing no oversold entry signal, while momentum_3m of 4.7% is modestly positive but below stronger peers. Net stance is HOLD pending a stronger composite or momentum inflection.

NVDA leads the basket with the highest composite_score of 15.283 and the strongest 3-month momentum at 17.36%, signaling robust trend strength. RSI_14 of 58.5 sits in a healthy mid-range, indicating room to run without overbought risk. High-conviction BUY supported uniformly across all three factors.

JPM has the lowest composite_score in the basket at -3.986 with negative 3-month momentum of -3.75%, signaling weak relative strength and an unfavorable entry for a momentum strategy. RSI_14 of 36.9 approaches but has not crossed the oversold threshold (<30), providing mild technical support for HOLD rather than outright SELL. Recommend HOLD pending either an oversold reversal signal or further deterioration confirming a SELL.
